title: UX Researcher
description: Amplitude is seeking a UX Researcher to help us understand our users and improve our product analytics platform. You'll conduct user research, analyze user behavior data, and provide insights to guide product decisions. This remote role offers the opportunity to impact how teams across the world use data to make decisions.
responsibilities: Design and conduct user research studies including interviews, surveys, and usability testing
Analyze user behavior data and behavioral metrics from analytics platforms
Synthesize research findings and create actionable recommendations for product teams
Present research insights to stakeholders and influence product decisions
Maintain research documentation and build a repository of user insights

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Psychology, HCI, Design, or related field
skills: User research methodologies and design thinking
Proficiency with research tools (UserTesting, Qualtrics, or similar)
Familiarity with analytics platforms and product thinking

benefits: Comprehensive health, vision, and dental coverage
